## What's on your mind?

Use this space for general questions, ideas, or discussion that doesn't
fit as a bug report or feature request.

## Category

- [ ] General question
- [ ] Idea / suggestion
- [ ] Show and tell
- [ ] Other

## Details

Provide as much context as helpful — what you're trying to do, what
you've already tried, or what you'd like feedback on.

## Related Links

Link any related issues, PRs, or documentation (e.g.
[`ROADMAP.md`](../ROADMAP.md), [`SUPPORT.md`](../SUPPORT.md)).
